โ  FX_CLOSED โ no_bars (FX-closed?). The agent is holding (no recenter / no reallocation) on this state.

Scanner โ net-APR ranking (this tick)

pooltierL-sharegrossLVRnet APR
โ
Ranks on NET (gross fee โ parametric LVR), fee_share in v3 L-units (F2). Reallocates only past the switch-cost hurdle (payback โค30d + 50bp hysteresis). Mostly declines at $10k โ the edge is structural. โ screened pools (TVL < $300k) are watched but not allocated โ their volume/TVL implies a wash-inflated APR a $10k LP can't actually earn.

Data-quality lamps

โ breaker: FX_CLOSED
โ Pyth FV: stale (FX-closed)
โ midโPyth: n/a
โ ฯ: 6.4% (2y prior)
โ gas: 0.0060 gwei
โ last tick: 2026-06-28 00:46:19Z
live_render.py ยท EUR/USD on Base ยท band ยฑ3% ยท ฯ blended (2y prior shrinking toward run-realized TWAP vol, F3) ยท fee_share in v3 L-units (F2) ยท LVR parametric @ ฯ (diagnostic, not subtracted from NAV) ยท basis a discrete realloc cost (F4) ยท TWAP mark via observe() (F1) ยท self-healing block cursor (F5) ยท two baselines (F8).
Reuses book.py (LP primitives) ยท sim.py (Elsts geometry, Ledger) ยท pyth.py (FV) ยท live_mid.py (Base RPC). Paper only.
